query:
UPDATE users 
SET 
  userTier = 'founder_core',
  seatNumber = CASE 
    WHEN email = 'zooleous1@gmail.com' THEN 1
    WHEN email = 'zooleous@hotmail.com' THEN 2
    WHEN email = 'cckendrick@ksu.edu' THEN 3
    WHEN email = 'zooleous5@gmail.com' THEN 4
  END,
  lifetimeFree = TRUE,
  founderBadge = CASE 
    WHEN email = 'zooleous1@gmail.com' THEN 'Founder #1'
    WHEN email = 'zooleous@hotmail.com' THEN 'Founder #2'
    WHEN email = 'cckendrick@ksu.edu' THEN 'Founder #3'
    WHEN email = 'zooleous5@gmail.com' THEN 'Founder #4'
  END,
  subscriptionTier = 'founder',
  seatType = 'reserved_family'
WHERE email IN ('zooleous1@gmail.com', 'zooleous@hotmail.com', 'cckendrick@ksu.edu', 'zooleous5@gmail.com');
